name: Don't Pass Null
source: Clean Code by Robert C. Martin, Chapter 7: Error Handling
problem: Passing null as a method argument requires the callee to add defensive null checks, and when it forgets to do so, a NullPointerException occurs deep inside the call stack at a location far from the actual bug.
steps: Avoid passing null as a function argument; treat it as a programming error, not a valid input.
Add a @NonNull annotation and/or assert parameter != null at the start of methods that must not receive null.
Redesign APIs that currently require callers to pass null for optional behavior by using method overloading or Optional.
In languages without built-in null safety, add null guards at public API boundaries and document them.
Use static analysis tools to detect null argument passing at compile time.
